programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will succeed, among others:to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Saved by the Barn
programme.desc: Dan McKernan left his previous life and moved to a house in the countryside.He established an animal reserve there on his family farm.The program includes everyday life in a rural settlement among animals.

programme.title: Saved by the Barn
programme.desc: Dan McKernan left his previous life and moved to a house in the countryside.He established an animal reserve there on his family farm.The program includes everyday life in a rural settlement among animals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: The fun never stops in New Orleans.This dancing city is, above all, the cradle of jazz - music resounds here from morning to evening, creating an amazing atmosphere, and artists from all over the world hang out in cafes and pubs.Colorful buildings and narrow streets give the city a unique character and thus become an attractive setting for film productions.There is also no shortage of different colors on Frenchmen Street, where Marcin can try on an original suit.Also expect a bit of poetry on the way to Miami!However, before we get there, Marcin will have to find his black, mechanical horse...

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: Thirst with Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Actress Shay Mitchell travels the world.In the places he visits, he pays attention to the alcohol served there.He tries the unique ingredients that make up these drinks and discovers the best bars.

programme.title: Thirst with Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Actress Shay Mitchell travels the world.In the places he visits, he pays attention to the alcohol served there.He tries the unique ingredients that make up these drinks and discovers the best bars.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Polish driver Dawid Andres continues his journey through the most interesting corners of the USA.He drives a truck every day.Thanks to it, viewers will see the United States from a new perspective.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Polish driver Dawid Andres continues his journey through the most interesting corners of the USA.He drives a truck every day.Thanks to it, viewers will see the United States from a new perspective.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid 5
programme.desc: Two unknown people, a woman and a man, are left in a lonely place with difficult climatic conditions.They must spend 21 days there without food, water or clothing.They can only take one item with them.The operators show how daredevils, relying on their own company, learn to cooperate and make key decisions together.Viewers will see that appropriate knowledge and skills can be very useful in extreme moments and even determine survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid 5
programme.desc: Two unknown people, a woman and a man, are left in a lonely place with difficult climatic conditions.They must spend 21 days there without food, water or clothing.They can only take one item with them.The operators show how daredevils, relying on their own company, learn to cooperate and make key decisions together.Viewers will see that appropriate knowledge and skills can be very useful in extreme moments and even determine survival.

programme.title: Africa Express
programme.desc: For the first time, the race will take participants across Africa.They will cover the route through Kenya and Tanzania - from the foot of Kilimanjaro, through the crowded streets of Arusha, to the sand dunes by the Indian Ocean and historic Mombasa, ending the competition in Nairobi.Eight couples: Ewa Gawryluk-Domaniecka with her husband Piotr Domaniecki, Edyta Zając with her partner Michał Mikołajczak, Nikodem Rozbicki with her friend Paweł Kurkowski, Wiktoria Gąsiewska with her brother Mateusz Gąsiewski, Tomasz Iwan with her partner Karolina Woźniak, Katarzyna Niezgoda with her husband Paweł Markiewicz, Izu Ugonoh with his wife Antonina Ugonoh and MonikaHoffman-Piszora, together with her sister Iga Hoffman, faces the challenges of harsh, unpredictable nature - lack of roads, difficult access to water and communication, time pressure and their own emotions.The program will be hosted by Iza Krzan.Every day, participants must demonstrate perseverance, cooperation and resilience while learning about completely different faces of Africa.It's a test of boundaries and a lesson in friendship The stakes are high in this episode - it's a competition for the last ticket to Kenya.The three immune couples relax at Tanga Marine Park while the rest of the contestants learn that the previously eliminated duo is back in the game.On a sisal plantation in Ngomeni, they must, with the support of local workers, separate and prepare the fibers for spinning, facing a language barrier.Then, there is a fight for the amulet at Lake Tongoni - the participants carry salt through the pool on a wobbly base, which requires precision and cooperation.The finale takes everyone to the Amboni Caves, where, led by a shaman, participants perform a ritual for the spirit of Mabawu among hundreds of bats.The last ticket to Kenya will go to the duo that can best cope with the challenges and demonstrate the greatest cooperation.

programme.title: Got Home Alive
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are people who set off on a journey into the unknown.In each episode, the creators of the series will present various adversities they encountered during the trip.

programme.title: Got Home Alive
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are people who set off on a journey into the unknown.In each episode, the creators of the series will present various adversities they encountered during the trip.

programme.title: Hotel Impossible
programme.desc: Anthony Melchiorri restores the splendor of run-down hotels.With the support of the project team, it introduces key changes.

programme.title: Hotel Impossible
programme.desc: Anthony Melchiorri restores the splendor of run-down hotels.With the support of the project team, it introduces key changes.

programme.title: Hotel Impossible
programme.desc: Anthony Melchiorri restores the splendor of run-down hotels.With the support of the project team, it introduces key changes.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will succeed, among others:to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Around the world in a camper
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Around the world in a camper
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Master chef Pascal Brodnicki shows viewers how to replace traditional dishes with Asian dishes.It proves that preparing an original dinner is simple and does not have to cost much.In search of culinary inspiration, he goes to Vietnam, Laos and Thailand.He shops at local markets, prepares and sells snacks on the street, and works on a rice plantation.To prove himself, he prepares exotic dishes for his Asian hosts.He tries grilled gecko and baked ant larvae, and accepts an invitation to an unusual hunt.

programme.title: Africa Express
programme.desc: For the first time, the race will take participants across Africa.They will cover the route through Kenya and Tanzania - from the foot of Kilimanjaro, through the crowded streets of Arusha, to the sand dunes by the Indian Ocean and historic Mombasa, ending the competition in Nairobi.Eight couples: Ewa Gawryluk-Domaniecka with her husband Piotr Domaniecki, Edyta Zając with her partner Michał Mikołajczak, Nikodem Rozbicki with her friend Paweł Kurkowski, Wiktoria Gąsiewska with her brother Mateusz Gąsiewski, Tomasz Iwan with her partner Karolina Woźniak, Katarzyna Niezgoda with her husband Paweł Markiewicz, Izu Ugonoh with his wife Antonina Ugonoh and MonikaHoffman-Piszora, together with her sister Iga Hoffman, faces the challenges of harsh, unpredictable nature - lack of roads, difficult access to water and communication, time pressure and their own emotions.The program will be hosted by Iza Krzan.Every day, participants must demonstrate perseverance, cooperation and resilience while learning about completely different faces of Africa.It's a test of boundaries and a lesson in friendship The stakes are high in this episode - it's a competition for the last ticket to Kenya.The three immune couples relax at Tanga Marine Park while the rest of the contestants learn that the previously eliminated duo is back in the game.On a sisal plantation in Ngomeni, they must, with the support of local workers, separate and prepare the fibers for spinning, facing a language barrier.Then, there is a fight for the amulet at Lake Tongoni - the participants carry salt through the pool on a wobbly base, which requires precision and cooperation.The finale takes everyone to the Amboni Caves, where, led by a shaman, participants perform a ritual for the spirit of Mabawu among hundreds of bats.The last ticket to Kenya will go to the duo that can best cope with the challenges and demonstrate the greatest cooperation.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The heroes of the program are brave Poles who put everything on one card, left the country and found happiness beyond its borders.They will share with viewers their own definition of happiness, talk about the beginnings of their careers, the obstacles they encountered, failures and victories, hard work and constant self-improvement.The heroes' stories will be enriched with the stories of their loved ones, friends and colleagues who supported and encouraged them in the most difficult moments.

programme.title: Success knows no limits
programme.desc: The second season of the program about Poles who decided to put everything on one card and prove that the life of an emigrant can be full of success.This season, Tomasz Kin will once again meet extraordinary people who found their happiness abroad.The protagonist of the series will include Radosław Malinowski, a lawyer living in Nairobi, who helps victims of human trafficking.Viewers will also meet Mieczysław Sobczak, known as Dziki Mietek, who lives in Peru and is a renowned local shaman and herbalist.The creators of the documentary will also present a hockey coach living in Canada - Jarosław Byrski.His pupils include:such stars as: Brent Burns, Bryan Bickell, and Rick Nash.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world Martyna Wojciechowska meets the most extraordinary animal guardian in the world.Shirley takes care of baby kangaroos whose mothers were killed by cars.He cares for them until they are twelve months old.The park, which she founded with her husband Russell, is home to one hundred kangaroos, fifty wallabies and thirteen koalas.Monotremes, crocodiles, turtles, emus, cockatoos, peacocks, guinea fowls, turkeys and... domestic chickens also live here.Thirty thousand visitors visit Pardana Wildlife every year.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: A series of reports presenting the customs and life situation of women living in distant corners of the globe.Journalist Martyna Wojciechowska once again sets out on risky expeditions to learn about the activities, passions and dreams of women living in different cultures.Stops in the third edition of the program include Samoa, Ghana and India.Together with her interlocutors, she experiences their joys and sorrows and participates in everyday activities.This allows her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity in different parts of the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska, the heroine of the episode, Nidialys Acosta Cabrera, guides Martyna Wojciechowska around a country where absurdities known to Poles from the times of the Polish People's Republic are commonplace.She is one of the few women driving a taxi in Havana.Her car is also an exception - a pink Chevrolet from the 1950s. Sometimes she changes it to a blue Chevrolet.He chooses the color of nail polish to match the color of the bodywork.Her first and favorite car was a Fiat 126 p - a car still popular on the island.The episode will feature a large dose of Cuban music and humor straight from Bareja's comedy.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.
